Configuration settings for BLE transport and host RPA resolver for cc2564x target.

# Purpose
The configuration file defines settings for a Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) system. The `BLE_TRANSPORT_LL` parameter is set to `socket`, indicating that the BLE transport layer uses socket communication. The `BLE_HOST_RPA_RESOLVER` parameter is set to `1`, which enables the Resolvable Private Address (RPA) resolver feature in the BLE host. These settings configure the BLE system's transport method and privacy features.
